items.value: YTP VARIANT Square YTP Gives you the highest digit that is above 0 in your YTP counter squared by 2.25. If your YTP counter is all 0, it gives you a default value of 35.
YTP VARIANT Square Root YTP Gives you the square root of the amount of points you got. The minimum amount it can give to you is 1.
YTP VARIANT Fake Green YTP Gives you -25 YTPs.
YTP VARIANT Fake Silver YTP Gives you -50 YTPs.
YTP VARIANT Fake Golden YTP Gives you -100 YTPs.
YTP VARIANT PI YTP Gives you 3 YTPs - but has a chance for 31 and an even rarer one for 314 YTPs.
YTP VARIANT Dancing YTP Gives 65 YTPs, but its unique function is to bounce like crazy in the room it spawns.
YTP VARIANT Mystery YTP Gives a random value between 5 and 105 YTPs.
YTP VARIANT Approximately YTP Gives a random value between -100 and 300 YTPs.
YTP VARIANT Greater Than Get a GREATER amount of points! The only twist is that you'll be right-slapped on the face!
YTP VARIANT Less Than Get a "Lesser" amount of points! The only twist is that you'll be left-slapped on the face!
YTP VARIANT Something YTP It could be anything! With only 25% of getting an item, and 65% of getting YTPs!
YTP VARIANT Teleporting YTP Clicking it gives 25 YTPs and it teleports to another spot in the schoolhouse.
YTP VARIANT Speedy YTP Grants 40-60 points and a 10-second speed boost. For when you need to be rich and fast, but not for very long.
YTP VARIANT The Outside YTPs Deploys a wandering cluster of YTPs that hops between item spawns. It's shy, so you'll have to be quick to grab it.
YTP VARIANT Blank YTP Copies over any other YTP the player has picked up.
YTP VARIANT E=MC² YTP Gives 150 YTPs and disables the power of the current room.
ZESTY BAR VARIANT Chocolate Pi Baldi baked a beautiful chocolate Pi! It refills 31.4% of your stamina and makes you 31.4% faster for 31.4 seconds!
ZESTY BAR VARIANT Tasty Pizza A delicious slice of pizza! Who wouldn't eat it? This refills your stamina to 100%! Surprisingly less energetic than zesty bars!
ZESTY BAR VARIANT Jar of Pickles Yummy! Leftover pickles from the camping trip! Each one gives you 50% of stamina boost for 30 seconds! However it's limited to 300% stamina.

ZESTY BAR VARIANT Hot Cross Bun This delicious candy has so much sugar Principal even prohibits you from eating it! It gives you 50% additional stamina, slice your stamina drop in half and gives you 15% more speed! BUT, for being dangerous to even eat, everyone around will know where you are!
ZESTY BAR VARIANT Orange Juice A high quality orange juice that gives you 100% energy! It's so refreshing to your body it even makes stamina regenerate faster and deplete faster!
ZESTY BAR & QUARTER VARIANTS Chocolate Quarter If you need to buy something and it's out of quarters, use this! This sweet chocolate gives you an instant stamina boost of 150% when eaten!

ZESTY BAR VARIANT Vanilla Zesty Bar A Zesty bar, but vanilla! Healthier than the usual sugar-flavoured chocolate! It refills your stamina to 350% and gives you a 10% speed boost! However, Baldi is also good at smelling! He's able of smelling the irresistible aroma of vanilla!
ZESTY BAR VARIANT Ice Zesty Bar A Zesty Bar, stuck in the freezer for 3 hours! It gives you 150% energy and is so frozen that everything you step on will freeze!
Chocolate Flavored Zesty Bar (With Chocolate Chunks)

ZESTY BAR VARIANT Chocolate Flavored Zesty Bar (With Chocolate Chunks) This unhealthy alternative to your average energy-flavored zesty bar is sure to give you cavities! Just take a bite and you'll get a sugar rush: for the first 30 seconds your stamina won’t drop and you’ll run slightly faster, but once the high ends, you’ll be a bit slower until the extra 100% stamina is burnt off.

ZESTY BAR VARIANT Diet Flavored Zesty Bar The energy bars needed to be healthier too, so these were made! Sadly, there had to be a compromise that made the energy less potent, so nobody actually calls it energy flavored anymore!

ZESTY BAR & CHALK ERASER VARIANTS Chalk Don't tell anyone I told you this, but the chalk is edible. It makes quite a bit of a mess, though. When eaten, it sets your stamina to half-full and creates a cloud of chalk dust that follows you around for a short moment.
ZESTY BAR VARIANT Panic Kernels If you're very hungry, you can eat this to refill a bit of your energy But the true power comes with using it with a BSODA!

ZESTY BAR VARIANT Thorn Glognut A famous snack from a local theme park called 'Glaggleland' Which is odd as it went defunct before Here school was built! Consuming this might have some side effects... but it's energetic!
ZESTY BAR VARIANT Ice Cream Sandwich This treat is deliciously messy! You can eat it while you walk, but you might leave sticky crumbs behind! Truly appetizing!
ZESTY BAR VARIANT Fizz Up A bubbly drink that speeds up your metabolism! You can even walk 15% faster.
(3) Grandma Brownie's Chocolate Chunker Wunker Bunkers (Now with even bigger chunks of chocolate chunks)
(2) Grandma Brownie's Chocolate Chunker Wunker Bunkers (Now with even bigger chunks of chocolate chunks)
(1) Grandma Brownie's Chocolate Chunker Wunker Bunkers (Now with even bigger chunks of chocolate chunks)

ZESTY BAR VARIANT Grandma Brownie's Chocolate Chunker Wunker Bunkers (Now with even bigger chunks of chocolate chunks) Delicious chocolate cereal, now with even bigger chunks of chocolate chunks! Don't say grandma brownie's chocolate chunker wunker bunkers now with even bigger chunks of chocolate chunks is in my store though. Use it to increase your stamina, but the loads of high-concentrated-fat might make you slow down.
ZESTY BAR VARIANT Speedy Donut This donut can make you go twice as fast in the halls! And yet, Principal of The Thing doesn't put you in detention for it!
ZESTY BAR VARIANT Coal Flavoured Zesty Bar Someone wanted to prank the Bully and put coal inside the Zesty Bar! And looks like everyone wants to prank others with it...
ZESTY BAR VARIANT Zesty Flavoured White Bar Boosts your stamina to 200%! But, you constantly lose stamina until you reach 50%. This is a balanced deal, just as things should be...
ZESTY BAR VARIANT Explosive Zesty Bar This Zesty Bar is very dangerous as it's a creation by the Bully to make students explode! While it can be used to scare people away, don't eat it anyway.
ZESTY BAR VARIANT Sparkly Water This fresh water is so sparkly it can make anyone glow! Although it makes beautiful sparks, they can also hurt anyone's vision.

ZESTY BAR VARIANT Yoyleberry Taken from the hidden lands of dreams and cartoonish generic-mouth characters, this metallic berry will literally weight you down once eaten — you'll move slower. But, this makes your metallic body immune to Baldi's almighty ruler! Just watch out to its short 5 seconds effect.
ZESTY BAR & YTP VARIANT YTP Energy Drink Maxes out your stamina and gives you a random amount of points! A thrilling gamble in a can, who would know?

ZESTY BAR VARIANT Fire Flavoured Zesty Bar A Zesty Bar was forgotten in the oven, and now we have the Fire Zesty Bar! Be careful, because if you eat it, you might turn yourself into a moving heavy train!
ZESTY BAR VARIANT Mystery Brew Coffee There's no indication over who brewed this thing. The caffeine used definitely came from another mystery dimension! You've got three speeding effects in it.

ZESTY BAR VARIANT Zesty Mega Bar Someone inflated this thing with pure fat! It's a new type of sugar, according to trustworthy Baldish scientific sources! You'll definitely get a quick rush, but end up absorbing too much fat, which slows you down for some time.
ZESTY BAR VARIANT Banana Delicious convenient banana! No wonder we can find 'Nana Peels from it.
ZESTY BAR VARIANT Spicy Dog So hot you run faster! But, make sure to not eat or drink anything else, or you might dry out his hotness!

DANGEROUS TELEPORTER VARIANT Calibrated Teleporter This is the teleporter for noobies! If you feel like the dangerous teleporter is too dangerous, use this! You can select a spot in the map to teleport, but with a limited range!

DANGEROUS TELEPORTER VARIANT Safer Teleporter Differently from the danger approach, the safer teleporter teleports you back to where you were 10 seconds ago! Unless Baldi is too close to that area, which is why this is a safe approach!

DANGEROUS TELEPORTER VARIANT Controlled Teleporter A less dangerous teleporter version. Just click the button and find yourself in a similar place! You'll always be teleported to the same room type you were before! But it cannot be used in hallways.
DANGEROUS TELEPORTER VARIANT Banana Teleporter Nothing's more funny than dropping random 'Nana Peels! Every time you change spots with this thing, you drop one peel!
DANGEROUS TELEPORTER VARIANT Detention Teleporter The technology behind Principal's ability to teleport you! Use it to teleport yourself to detention... if you ever need to.

PRINCIPAL'S WHISTLE VARIANT Principal O'Eleporter Is Principal's reaction not enough for you? We made it even more instant! You can literally teleport Principal to your location! But, with a twist: there's a 25% of getting random characters instead!

DANGEROUS TELEPORTER VARIANT Broken Teleporter A teleporter that works... sort of. You're teleported once but your body will be a little misfigured for a while and you'll need to do some exercise to recover your stamina!

DANGEROUS TELEPORTER VARIANT Pocket Teleporter If it was too pressuring getting to random places at random invervals, this thing reduces the load for you! You've got yourself five uses of randomized teleport!

DANGEROUS TELEPORTER VARIANT Gateway Teleporter Warps you directly to an open exit. And NO, this isn't an artificial tool from Arts and Crafters. His power is pure artistic magic, a true artist's power.
DANGEROUS TELEPORTER VARIANT Proto-Teleporter An old prototype of Baldi's teleporter! It was scrapped due to having some.. delays, surely it's still safe to use though. They're easier to produce!
DANGEROUS TELEPORTER VARIANT Supercharged Teleporter An experimental supercharged version of Baldi's Dangerous Teleporter. It has some time-bending side effects.
DANGEROUS TELEPORTER VARIANT Wormhole-Powered Teleporter Baldi's experiments on the wormholes allowed him to make this! It utilizes them in a "safe" way and makes for better transportation.

PRINCIPAL'S WHISTLE VARIANT Hallway Echo Whistle Such a powerful whistle that it can indicate any misbehavior from far away! If you've got any real trouble, use this to call Principal and Baldi to whatever you're aiming at (walls-only).

PRINCIPAL'S WHISTLE VARIANT Framing Whistle This modified whistle will always frame the closest person, even if they aren't even visible for you! Don't feel bad though; It's not you, it's them... Probably.

'NANA PEEL & DANGEROUS TELEPORTER VARIANTS Teleporter O'Wall That's the floating skateboard! When hitting a wall, you teleport! Sadly, nobody knows how to really use it because it floats. So you're at its mercy when you slip over it.
'NANA PEEL VARIANT Landmine Ever needed to make sure nothing can get in your way? Place down this! Anyone that steps on it will surely be BLOWN away in more ways than one!
'NANA PEEL VARIANT Golden Banana Oooh... Banana. Throw on the ground, select the direction, and feel the glorious slide.
‘NANA PEEL VARIANT Flashbang Literally a flash bomb, it can blind everyone around. Sunglasses not included.

ALARM CLOCK & ‘NANA PEEL VARIANT Noise Device Throw it and leave it by for some time. When you need to alert Baldi, just click the conveninently-located button on your hand! Perfect for blaming others.
APPLE & 'NANA PEEL VARIANT Chocolate Banana Baldi loves bananas (as part of his diet), but especially chocolate ones! He'll be so distracted by the taste he might leave the peel behind!
'NANA PEEL VARIANT Chocolate 'Nana Peel This peel is so melted in chocolate it slides on its own! Anyone who comes in contact with this will go along the ride!
'NANA PEEL VARIANT Ice 'Nana Peel What happens when you put a banana in the freezer for 10 months? It freezes like this! It's pretty cold, and if you trip over it, it's even colder.
'NANA PEEL VARIANT Bag O' Marbles It's a bag of funny looking balls! Each one can make you slip, like a 'Nana Peel!
'NANA PEEL VARIANT Bucket O' Water This bucket can lead anyone either forward or backwards. Strangely, its motionless water can't make the floor wet.
NANA PEEL VARIANT Exotic Butters As a reward for everyone's hard work, Baldi has brought some Exotic Butters to the schoolhouse! They're kind of slippery, but taste delicious!
'NANA PEEL VARIANT Glass 'Nana Peel This 'nana is very powerful if used correctly to navigate, but don't let it shatter.
NANA PEEL VARIANT Overripe 'Nana Peel To keep students safe from slipping all over the place, we have these colorful bananas that will make you slip 50% less than any ordinary banana!
'NANA PEEL VARIANT Sad-Peel Aww, this thing is sad! It's so sad it seeks out friends in hopes of a nice conversation or two! Sadly, all the friends it tries to make can do is slip.

QUARTER VARIANT Quarter on a String A quarter on a string that can be used up to three times. But since you're tricking a vending machine, it counts as bullying it! You don't wanna make the machine sad, do you?!
QUARTER VARIANT Dollar Bill A crispy dollar bill! Put one of these in a vending machine, and you'll get four times the amount! Capitalism at its finest.

QUARTER VARIANT 3D Printed Quarter This quarter is fake, it has been 3D printed! It acts exactly like stuff that would need a shiny quarter. However, by a 60% chance, you might succeed or fail! Principal doesn't like people bullying machines with fake quarters either!
QUARTER VARIANT Chipped Penny A penny which has a chip taken out of it. This thing should be worthless. However, it appears to have strange properties. Use it wisely

NAMETAG VARIANT Energy Nametag Just like a faculty nametag, but this one's special! You can run faster through the hallways! That's the real technology Principal uses to be faster than you! But remember, when it's gone, it'll drain all over your stamina... for some reason...

NAMETAG VARIANT Principal's Bow Tie The only one special bow tie from our world's best Principal! Using it will give you the authority to send anyone (except Baldi and Principal) to detention! But if Principal catches you impersonating him, you'll get a very well deserved punishment.
CHALK ERASER VARIANT Fog Machine One of Baldi's old Fog Machines, it malfunctions from time to time. However, after some tweaking, this is now a useful tool for you! It creates a big area of fog!

CHALK ERASER VARIANT Chalk Bomb If the chalk eraser wasn't enough to make you hide, you can push everyone too - that's bullying though! This is like a blinding chalk bomb! It's so loud it can even break windows as well!

CHALK ERASER VARIANT Tinted Paint Bomb One of Bully's best creations! You can paint any surface and even try to make the room darker! With such efficiency, the only way to remove it is with flood water!
CHALK ERASER VARIANT Electric Chalk Eraser A Chalk Eraser, but electric! Meaning it's more powerful, filling almost a room with smoke! But there may be some shaky electricity.
CHALK ERASER VARIANT Fire Extinguisher EMERGENCY! There's a fire, so what do you do? Use this fire extinguisher to blow out the fire! It can create a bunch of extinguishing gas in a single hallway.
CHALK ERASER VARIANT Chalk Box With this box of multi-colored chalk, you can make any classroom door blend right into the walls! Please, don't eat it.
DETENTION KEY VARIANT Killer Key A normal detention key, but one that Principal hates! When used, it makes the door unable of locking ever again!
KEY VARIANT Special Key A super master key! It can deform into any lock entrance dynamically! You can unlock normal doors, swinging doors, coin doors and more!
KEY VARIANT Candy Key This candy replica of Principal's Key is can unlock any door as you wish. However, since it is a candy, it can be equally tasty!
PRINCIPAL'S KEYS VARIANT Key Ring Some staff member accidentally left these lying on the desk, maybe not even Principal might be the one using it! They can unlock any regular door or special locks!
PRINCIPAL'S KEYS VARIANT Mystery Key A super duper mystery key that can cause different outcomes! Might open the door, might do nothing, might summon an unwanted guest. Feeling lucky, yet?
SCISSORS VARIANT Dangerous Scissors If you are a pro on using scissors, this is for you! You can cut stuff normally, but also do dangerous stuff! But don't do it, please.
SCISSORS VARIANT Metal Scissors A safety scissors with an extra feature: a key feature! If you're locked unexpectedly, you can use this to run away! That's real safety!
SCISSORS VARIANT Cardboard Scissors Someone made this in the art class, it's a weakened scissors! Each time you use, there's a small chance it'll actually work.
SWINGING DOOR LOCK VARIANT Universal Lock This item can lock swinging doors and standard doors! That's the real power of an universal lock!
DOOR LOCK VARIANT Weak Lock This is a rather weak lock you can only use on doors. However, due to its fragile nature, it only can stand 3 rattles.
DOOR LOCK VARIANT Student's Lock A transparent door lock made for students! Everyone else is left knocking while you can just walk right in!
TECHNOBOOTS VARIANT Shiny Clean Gloves Just as clean as big boots, these big gloves make doors silent!
TECHNOBOOTS VARIANT Really Tall Boots If not sliding over stuff wasn't enough, you can stomp them too! But be careful, taking them off might make you fall straight to the floor!
TECHNOBOOTS VARIANT Proto-Shoes Baldi's failed experiment on the well-known Techno-Boots, but they're far more weaker compared to them. But hey, at least Baldi made a few of them!
TECHNOBOOTS VARIANT Ballet Shoes People usually don't walk on these, so it's pretty hard. For the effort of using these, you'll lose more of your energy. At least you can avoid anyone with it!
TECHNOBOOTS VARIANT Stompy Boots Each step is a thunderous stomp that shoves anyone out of your way. Legend says Baldi made this since his "old" days, but that's just a theory!
TECHNOBOOTS VARIANT Iron Shoes WOW! These construction oriented safety-boots are REALLY heavy! ..SO... HEAVY... OH NO IM FALLING THROUGH THE FLOOR WHILE WRITING THIS AAAAHHHHH!!!!
ALARM CLOCK VARIANT Test Clock We needed to make a test clock, to test time properties! The design is totally not a joke! It's a test after all! Putting this down will make time stop for some time.
ALARM CLOCK VARIANT Wheel Clock Push this little thing to distract Baldi by distance! You cannot set the timer, but you can aim at a wall and it'll ring instantly at it!
ALARM CLOCK VARIANT Dynamite Clock This clock will no only call Baldi's attention, it also pushes everyone back! This is dangerous!
ALARM CLOCK VARIANT Ancient Clock An ancient clock with the strong property of drawing everyone's attention. Literally, everyone. That should explain why they stopped making these...
ALARM CLOCK VARIANT Teleporting Clock Once placed, it'll make sure to teleport you back after a minute! It may draw Baldi's attention sometimes though.
ALARM CLOCK VARIANT Super-Charged Alarm Clock This alarm clock has the voltage power of 99 lighting bolts! Just be careful with over frying the generator!

ALARM CLOCK VARIANT Angry Alarm Woah, what's got this thing so mad It looks like it's ready to throw some hands! If it had any. Just plop it down and wait for it to go off! It'll go KAPOW at whatever it wishes.
TAPE VARIANT Baldi's Most Favorite Tape You don't even need to guess what song is it... But hey, Baldi loves it To a point which he literally ignores everything else for the sake of fun!
TAPE VARIANT Everyone's Least Favorite Tape A smarter student made an even better tape. Playing this will not only make everyone go away, but also ignore everything!
TAPE VARIANT If you need to start a party, play this tape! It'll instantly draw everyone's attention! Unfortunately, you cannot summon prizes or balloons from it, that's for a special event...
TAPE VARIANT Portal Tape A invention powered by wormholes! This tape can harnass the power of wormholes to cause disruption in the schoolhouse. Isn't that crazy?
GRAPPLING HOOK VARIANT Pushing Hook Definition of asking for personal space. You don't need to tell anyone to stay away, you can make them stay away!
GRAPPLING HOOK VARIANT Harpoon Used for fishing, this is a fun little contraption you can use to traverse around the halls. However, it's better used on other people. Be careful, ok?

GRAPPLING HOOK VARIANT Bouncy Grappling Hook Although it looks familiar, it's a totally different hook! If you need to go at multiple places at once, this is for you! It does not only pulls, it bounces too!
GRAPPLING HOOK VARIANT Cheap Grappling Hook This was cheaply made in 40 minutes! But it's worth a shot to travel small distances.
GRAPPLING HOOK VARIANT Chargin' Hook It's literally a CHARGING hook. Launches you forward until you hit something or someone.
PORTAL POSTER VARIANT Portal Door Baldi got tired of walking around, so he invented this! Just place it anywhere, walk in, and end up somewhere else! Patent is pending.
PORTAL POSTER VARIANT Portal Poster V2.0 Baldi decided to add some tweaks to his patented Portal Poster. Now, only the user can walk through it while everyone else gets whisked away!
PORTAL POSTER VARIANT Adaptive Portal Poster This smart portal analyzes threats and teleports you to the safest spot. It's also a coward and will self-destruct if a teacher gets too close.
BSODA VARIANT Sad Soda This soda is so sad it needs to follow someone to not feel alone. Aim this on anybody to target them indefinitely!
BSODA VARIANT Rootbeer The Principal wouldn't allow us to sell actual beer, so we have this instead! This rootbeer is very good, and can help you get a large group of threats to go away!
BSODA VARIANT Shaken Soda Someone just shook this can of soda and it's pretty dangerous to leave alone. It might even leave a puddle of soda when it explodes!
BSODA VARIANT Shrink Ray A ray that shoots a strong beam that is capable of squishing everyone! And also pushing them!
BSODA VARIANT Energy Flavored Zesty Soda A fizzy blast of energy! It's a super formula of zesties and BSODAs mixed together! Let's have a full vigor ready to go!

BSODA VARIANT OSODA A orange-flavored energetic drink! Since it has a fruit, its pushing powers are a bit weakened. Which means people can go through, at least this drink creates a soda-sized puddle...
BSODA VARIANT Lemon Soda A fresh taste of lemon to take things in a spite turn! Anyone who's splashed with this super BSODA will be stunned by its acid touch.
BSODA VARIANT Frog in a Can That mischevious bully crammed a frog inside this can as a prank! Works great for distracting people!
BSODA VARIANT BSODA Gun If you need to drink something as fast as a bullet, this was designed for it!
BSODA VARIANT Diet Diet BSODA Ever needed an even HEALTHIER alternative to BSODA? This one has ragus instead of sugar! It also has green.
BSODA VARIANT Diet Diet Diet BSODA The Diet Diet BSODA's were still not healthy enough, so this BSODA has nothing at all! It can't even MOVE, that's how much nothing it has!

BSODA VARIANT Diet Diet Diet Diet BSODA You can't get healthier than this! It's so healthy, it multiplies itself and healthing healthiness more than health healthiness health health. Containing only 0% liquid and about 100% raguS, it's the perfect drink!
BSODA VARIANT Plunger We don't even have bathrooms, what is this for?! At least it blinds people for some time... Hopefully this is not for some kind of boss fight agaisnt a teacher...
BSODA VARIANT Bloxy Cola Refreshing blocky soda. For having different physics, it leaves stains in the floor (DUH!). This mess is as slippery as 'Nana Peels.
BSODA VARIANT Rotatoda Some students got mad we kept making healthier sodas, so we made something unhealthy! The mixture of ingredients even allows the soda to think on it's own, and rotate!
BSODA VARIANT Spilling BSODA Aw man! This was a perfect BSODA to drink! It's spilling all around! Nobody can walk through it because of how sticky it is!

BSODA VARIANT Subspace Soda This soda tries to imitate the super technology of a Subspace Tripmine. Unfortunately, it's not fully stable, you never know when it's gonna fail... Leave it on the floor, and it should explode in a bit... maybe!
BSODA VARIANT RGBODA (Red) A slightly faster BSODA with a taste of... RED?! It can bounce walls as well.
BSODA VARIANT RGBODA (Green) Spitting this into a wall could start a "Green Revenge!"; Throwing two more foams to the sides!
BSODA VARIANT RGBODA (Blue) The only one normal tastes like a BSODA and acts like a normal BSODA. What were you expecting, water?
BSODA VARIANT PSODA Sprays out a shocking liquid! Now with 100% more zap! Use this to electrocute people with this super-charged drink!
BSODA VARIANT Retro Fire Flower A very odd-looking flower that came from some retro place(s)... Use it three times to kill your enemies!

BSODA VARIANT Bacon Soup A warm can of bacon-y goodness, you surely will like this. It's made just the way the little devil likes it! The spray might slow down the unfortunate folks by a little, while also giving you some classical tasting energy.
BSODA & ALARM CLOCK VARIANT Loud Speaker An old loud speaker found in Baldi's Lab! It's so loud that it could probably push people away from it for a few seconds!
BSODA VARIANT RSODA This hot sau- drink is so spicy, that it literally gets angrier and faster with every person it hits.
BSODA VARIANT Homemade BSODA This BSODA isn't actually homemade, it was made in a factory: a bomb factory, it's a bomb. It could explode people for 30 seconds, that's how advanced it is.
BSODA VARIANT Snow Gun Tired of wanting to have a snowball fight but can't shoot them and always miss? Well, we have this! Although it can only hold 3 at most.
BSODA VARIANT Spiky Ball Drop this toy on the floor and it will start to bounce around, it'll hurt once it hits you!
BSODA VARIANT MSODA This thing tastes so good that it can literally attract everyone to it! They'll all rush towards it! ...Or maybe it's just magnetic to matter.
BSODA VARIANT Plastic Soda Looks and tastes cheap. Its quality even reflects its own resistance: after 3 hits, it's no longer there!
BSODA VARIANT Acid Soda A highly corrosive soda that's definitely just a little more citric! However, handle it with care, it could potentially blind a few folks when in contact with the eyes!

BSODA VARIANT Confetti Cannon Need something to celebrate parties at the Super Schoolhouse? You've just met your best party pal here! Just activate the trigger and have a blast of confetti! Its technology allows it to praise over whoever is hit with it! Just don't ask who voiced it...
BSODA VARIANT Creepy Baldi Balloon Some creepy half-deflated Baldi-shaped balloon that was found laying around. Everyone hates this thing! Its strength can push them away too.
BSODA VARIANT 360SODA This soda has enough fire power to be launched in 16 cardinal directions! If you don't know where your enemies are, they could be anywhere!!
BSODA VARIANT Spiny BSODA Be careful throwing this cactus can! It could explode and launch a bunch of spikes around... How the heck is this considered drinkable??
BSODA VARIANT Laboratory BSODA This purpleish BSODA can throw four diets in a single shot, and in many angles!
BSODA VARIANT CeleSoda Surprise! It's someone's birthday!
BSODA VARIANT Exploda-BSODA It's a BSODA that goes boom on impact. Maybe now you can taste personal space.
BSODA VARIANT 1-Liter BSODA Why drink one can when you can have up to seven full drinks?
BSODA VARIANT YSODA The YSODA contains special ingredients that will make you feel like metal! It might even metalify anything it hits! Yoy!

WD40 VARIANT WD-YesSquee Tired of the loud silence, making you feel a little alone? WD-YesSquee can solve your problems! Spray it anywhere to make everything around you incredibly loud! This may even include libraries!

WD40 VARIANT WODA-NoSquee Want to have a nice drink without making so much noise? Well, this drink can make your drinking much more silent! Watch out where you spray it, though. Anything cleaned by this product will make stuff near them silent as well!
WD-40 VARIANT WD-MoreFreeze Needed an even fresh clean up in the noisy hallways? This thing solves that for you, it mute things and give you a *breeze* that slows down!
WD-40 VARIANT WD-RetroSquee When your doors are too loud and you need 'em to be QUIET!
WD-40 VARIANT Multi Purpose Cleaner uUse this to a clean up sound and floor, to a degree that it is slippery too!
WD-40 VARIANT WD-NoSqueeX A deluxe version of the WD-NoSquee. This thing is so handy, you could use it to keep a whole school quiet! ...Well, probably not; but, it's a pretty big radius.

APPLE VARIANT Hair Spray The classic hair spray, makes people grow hair. This is only needed for people who have suffered bullying for being bald. Surely, no teacher would be that immature to drink one of these...

APPLE VARIANT A Green Apple For Baldi A tasty green apple that has less sugar to keep students healthy! Baldi doesn’t like green apples but still eats them if given. You can still put the apple in a plant to make it mature.
APPLE VARIANT Ominous Apple This apple isn't as smelly as the other ones. So, Baldi can't pick it up if he gets you. But you can throw it! Surely, he'll notice this way.
APPLE VARIANT Plastic Apple An apple made with cheap plastic to look like a real one. You can give it to Baldi, but he might not turn out that happy about it...
APPLE VARIANT Air Literally nothing. Baldi seems to enjoy it, though he's now being pushed around by... nothing?
APPLE & 'NANA PEEL VARIANT BanApple A banana on top of an apple. Eating it should give you enough stamina to run, but only after slipping through the peel! Or, you could give to Baldi as a prank.
APPLE Caramelized Apple A very sweety apple covered on the sweetest caramel! Baldi could stay eating for many minutes! But, the sugar rush also pushes him to his slapping limit.
APPLE VARIANT Teddy Bear for Playtime A cuddly friend to make Playtime genuinely happy. No jumpropes can make someone as happy as having a true fluffy friend around you.

APPLE VARIANT Shiny Trophy This trophy is only given out to the best of the best! Baldi loves to congratulate his hard working students in sight, so he will wait much longer after you get a question right! But if he finds out this isn't yours...
APPLE VARIANT Cup of Tea for Principal The Principal left around his tea, and you can bring it back! He'll make sure to drink it if he gets it. It even makes him nicer to people! Sometimes.
APPLE VARIANT Explosive Apple Juice Wow! This.. seems dangerous. But Baldi will probably try it anyway! Don't worry though, it's not THAT dangerous.
APPLE A Pizza for Everyone A tasty meal Baldi borrowed from the campsite! Its multi-use nature allows everyone to have a slice! Just throw one slice and they'll catch it like dogs!
BUS PASS VARIANT Fabricated Bus Pass This little dirty item might trick some folks that manages the Field Trip minigames. But it's not 100% guaranteed! In fact, it is 25%!
BUS PASS VARIANT One Dollar Check A piece of paper that is worth four shiny quarters! You can redeem it at Johnny's store!
BUS PASS VARIANT Deluxe Bus Pass Where did you get this double-rewarding-pass from? "An ant"? What the heck is that supposed to mean?!
INVISIBILITY ELIXIR VARIANT Special Potion A special potion that phases the consumer out of existance for a short time! You can use it to sneak through people without them noticing!
STRETCHY GLOVES VARIANT Stretchy Sticky Gloves Who knew literal slime gloves could be useful? You can grab things, and they grab you back!
LOST ITEM VARIANT Lost and Found Box Any student would be happy to find one of these!
